apps.name: LingoBear
apps.description: AI voice language learning iOS app. You speak, it coaches you in real time with AI conversation.
apps.differentiator: Voice-first conversational AI — not flashcard-based like Duolingo
apps.target: People who want to actually speak a language, not just memorize vocab

apps.name: BookBuds
apps.description: Read with friends iOS app. Social reading experience — share highlights, read together.
apps.differentiator: Reading is a shared experience, not a solo activity
apps.target: Book lovers who want community around reading
